Refactor auth

A short plan document exercising the rendering pipeline.

Goals

  • Replace session cookies with tokens
  • Keep the old legacy login working
  • Ship behind a flag1

Tasks

  • Write the spec
  • Implement the middleware

Code

func main() {
	fmt.Println("hello")
}

plain block, no language

Matrix

Case Result
happy pass
sad fail

Note: rollback plan lives at https://example.com/rollback

  1. auth_v2 in the flags service. ↩︎
